welcome.title: Welcome to Aura Terminal™ community
welcome.subtitle: Select a channel to start chatting
welcome.part1:
🎉 Welcome to Aura Terminal™ Network! 🎉

Welcome to the most elite trading and wealth-building community on the planet! We're thrilled to have you join us on this incredible journey toward financial freedom and generational wealth.

## 📋 COMMUNITY RULES

1. Respect & Professionalism
   ⬢ Treat all members with respect and professionalism
   ⬢ No harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks
   ⬢ Maintain a positive and constructive environment

2. Trading & Investment Discussions
   ⬢ Share knowledge and insights, not financial advice
   ⬢ All trades are at your own risk - we are not financial advisors
   ⬢ Use proper risk management and never trade more than you can afford to lose
welcome.part2:
3. Content & Privacy
   ⬢ Keep conversations relevant to trading, wealth-building, and course topics
   ⬢ Do not share personal financial information (account numbers, passwords, etc.)
   ⬢ Respect intellectual property - do not share copyrighted course materials

4. Spam & Promotion
   ⬢ No spam, self-promotion, or affiliate links without permission
   ⬢ Do not promote other trading services or products
   ⬢ Keep discussions focused on learning and community growth

5. Course Access
   ⬢ Course-specific channels are for enrolled members only
   ⬢ Share insights and ask questions related to your enrolled courses
   ⬢ Complete courses in order for maximum learning effectiveness

6. Community Support
   ⬢ Help fellow members when you can
   ⬢ Ask questions - we're all here to learn and grow together
   ⬢ Report any issues or concerns to staff members

7. Platform Usage
   ⬢ Use appropriate language and avoid profanity
   ⬢ Keep messages clear and concise
   ⬢ Use channels for their intended purposes
welcome.part3:
## 🚀 GETTING STARTED

1. Complete your profile - Add your bio
2. Explore channels - Check out different course and trading channels
3. Join discussions - Start participating in conversations
4. Enroll in courses - Begin your wealth-building journey
5. Earn XP - Level up by being active in the community

## 💎 PREMIUM BENEFITS

Premium members get access to:
⬢ Exclusive VIP channels and content
⬢ Premium trading signals and insights
⬢ Advanced course materials
⬢ Priority support from our team
⬢ Elite trader discussions

## ⚡ QUICK TIPS

⬢ Earn XP by sending messages, sharing files, and being active
⬢ Level up to unlock new channels and features
⬢ Check the announcements channel regularly for updates
⬢ Connect with other traders in the general chat channels

Remember: Success in trading comes from discipline, education, and consistent action. We're here to support you every step of the way!

Click the ✅ below to acknowledge you've read and agree to follow these rules, and unlock access to all channels.

Let's build generational wealth together! 💰🚀

outlook.emptyChanges: No themes recorded. Use Edit to add.
outlook.emptyFocus: No focus items. Use Edit to add.
outlook.derivThenLeadership: Leadership, breadth, and liquidity windows decide whether the narrative holds.
outlook.derivImplCorrelations: Correlations often tighten when macro headlines align across regions.
outlook.derivThenCalendar: Calendar spacing and overlap sessions shape follow-through.
outlook.derivImplConfirmBreadth: Confirm with breadth and volatility regime.
outlook.instrumentFbNote: Cross-asset read synthesized from desk signals.
outlook.why0: USD rebalancing resets short-term positioning; FX pairs need a new driver.
outlook.why1: Gold vs real yields keeps macro sensitivity visible across assets.
outlook.why2: Oil moves feed inflation expectations and second-order rates impact.
outlook.why3: Geopolitical premium lifts volatility and weakens correlation stability.

calendar.chooseDateWeekly: Choose a day (week view follows that day)

macroGen.exec_shrink: Shrink into print · add only on clean follow-through.
macroGen.exec_size_depth: Size to depth · avoid sweeping thin legs.
macroGen.exec_align: Align sleeves · impulse only if cross-asset agrees.
macroGen.exp_drift_core: Drift into catalyst — no clean trend until trigger.
macroGen.ctx_part_firm: Firmer — broader participation when sleeves align.
macroGen.ctx_liq_thin: Thin — clip size into prints & handoffs.
macroGen.ctx_liq_stable: Stable but not deep — avoid size spikes.
macroGen.ctx_vol_exp: Expansion live — tails & gaps in play.
macroGen.ctx_corr_break: Decoupling risk — leadership can rotate fast.
macroGen.ctx_corr_tight: Tight linkage — shocks propagate across sleeves.
macroGen.ctx_corr_mix: Mixed linkage — confirm impulse before size.
macroGen.ctx_pos_crowd: Crowded — unwind risk into catalyst window.
macroGen.ctx_pos_light: Light — room to lean if liquidity holds.
macroGen.risk_up_txt: Weak — no aggressive chase without catalyst.
macroGen.risk_dn_txt: Limited — lack of forced positioning unwind.
macroGen.risk_liq_txt: Moderate — depth can disappear during transitions.
macroGen.edge_exec_print: Execution: react into prints · cut size pre-release.
macroGen.edge_exec_drift: Execution: scalp ranges · no swing adds.
macroGen.edge_risk_high: Risk: gap · slice orders through catalysts.
macroGen.edge_risk_low: Risk: chop · poor R/R without clock.

structureMap.means_breaking: Sleeves can diverge — breakout trades need sleeve confirmation.
structureMap.means_high: Cross-asset moves likely to sync — expression risk is correlated.
structureMap.means_rotational: Leadership can rotate without a single macro trend holding.

marketDecoder.searchPlaceholder: Symbol or name (e.g. EUR, gold, SPY)
marketDecoder.flowText: Decode a symbol → review the full brief in the preview → Export sends bias, levels, and context into Trader Lab. Then use Checklist and Calculator.
marketDecoder.howToUse: How to use · what this is
marketDecoder.whatThisIsText: One pre-trade brief — context and filters, not a signal feed.
marketDecoder.bestUseText: Read posture and risks first; execute only when your trigger still aligns.
marketDecoder.decodeSymbolToOpen: Decode a symbol to open the brief preview.
marketDecoder.openPreviewThenExport: Open the preview to read the full desk, then export to Trader Lab.
marketDecoder.reviewThenExport: Review the brief, then Export to continue in Trader Lab with this context.
marketDecoder.structureBiasHelp: Five daily closes are required for trend, MAs, and pivots. Quote and calendar may still apply — use Refresh decode or confirm symbol mapping. Full detail appears in the brief preview.
marketDecoder.flowStep1Note: Start with bias, conviction, and current posture.
marketDecoder.flowStep2Note: Use price action, levels, and scenario map.
marketDecoder.flowStep3Note: Review macro calendar, headlines, and positioning.
marketDecoder.flowStep4Note: Only act if the posture and trigger still align.

surveillance.severityHelp: Editorial urgency 1–5. Accent colors mark watch, elevated, and critical tiers.
surveillance.marketRiskHelp: Lean from the asset-impact scan (risk-on / risk-off / supply shock). Neutral when unclear.
surveillance.corroborationHelp: Independent coverage overlap on the same storyline. Higher counts mean stronger cross-check.
surveillance.sourceQualityHelp: Publisher tier (official, institutional, authority, corroborated, public). Open an item for the original link — internal ingest labels are not shown on the tape.
surveillance.intensityScoresNote: Close intensity scores usually mean comparable weighting, not identical risk. Use severity, source quality, and recency to judge urgency.
surveillance.tapeHint: Intensity and freshness drive order · open a row for verification detail and the original publisher link · lens highlights in-sector nodes

journal.title: Aura Journal
journal.earnXpBody: Add personal tasks (+5), save diary or notes (+5), complete tasks with picture proof (+25). Day/week/month completion XP (min 5 tasks) when you open the journal.
journal.mandatoryLede: Set by Aura for your plan. They count toward your daily completion — same rules as your personal list (Saturday is a rest day).

journal.reflectionLede: Everything here is saved per day, just for you — diary entry, mood, and short reflection notes.
